title: Unsupported: Blocked and non-blocking assignments to same variable

features.name: mixed blocking and non-blocking assignments to same variable
features.description: Code should include both non-blocking assignment (<=) in an always_ff procedural block and blocking assignment (=) via assign continuous assignment to the same variable

features.name: indexed part select on lhs in always_ff and assign
features.description: Code should include indexed part select syntax [start +: width] used on the left-hand side of assignments in both always_ff and assign contexts to the same variable
